name: Indonesian Barbecued Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SHRIMP-----------------------------------
1 1/2 lb Shrimp, peeled
2 tbsp Vegetable oil
2 tbsp Water
1 tbsp Lemon juice
1 tsp Brown sugar (packed)
1/2 tsp Salt
1/2 tsp Red pepper sauce
2 Garlic cloves, crushed
Prepare dipping sauce by mixing all ingredients until smooth. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
Make a shallow cut lengthwise down the back of each shrimp; wash out vein. Mix remaining ingredients in a medium glass bowl. Add shrimp; stir to coat with marinade. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, turning occasionally if possible.
Remove shrimp from marinade; reserve marinade. Thread shrimp onto 6 metal skewers, leaving space between each. Cover and grill shrimp about 4 inches from the coals, turning occasionally and brushing 2-3 times with marinade until shrimp are pink, 10-20 minutes.
Serve with sauce and lime wedges, if desired.
